intro: Learn the cards, explore symbols, or try a three-card demo draw. Create a free account to save journeys and unlock AI readings.

encyclopedia.title: 78 Cards
encyclopedia.body: Quick summaries, keywords, and symbolism for every Major & Minor Arcana card.

suits.title: Tarot Symbols
suits.body: Themes of the tarot symbols and Major Arcana. A practical symbolism overview.

history.title: Tarot roots
history.body: Where tarot comes from and how it connects to CosmicTrack’s journey approach.

demo.title: Ask the cards
demo.body: Pick 3 cards, read classic upright/reversed meanings. Demo — no AI.

demoPanel.title: Ask the cards
demoPanel.subtitle: Pick three cards — no sign-up required.
demoPanel.hint: Need AI interpretation? Create an account first.

savePanel.title: Save your journeys
savePanel.body: Store readings step by step, organize them with categories, and get AI interpretations based on your plan.

cardsPage.title: Card encyclopedia
cardsPage.intro: Short summaries, keywords, and symbolism for every card. Upright/reversed reading lines are only used in demo draws and member areas.

symbolsPage.title: Tarot symbols
symbolsPage.intro: Symbols are tarot’s hidden keys. Pick a symbol from the list and read its meaning on the right.
